REQUIRED_FIELDS.id: Campaign id. Dismissal is keyed to this — a NEW id re-shows the offer to everyone, including users who dismissed a previous campaign. Convention: name-v1, name-v2.
REQUIRED_FIELDS.enabled: Kill switch. Set false to hide the offer for everyone within the hour.
REQUIRED_FIELDS.percent: Display percentage (1-99). MUST match the real Lemon Squeezy discount or users see a different price at checkout.
REQUIRED_FIELDS.code: The Lemon Squeezy discount code. Pre-applied at checkout + shown in the modal for copy. Must exist and be active in LS.
REQUIRED_FIELDS.minDaysInstalled: Days since install before the gift appears. 0 = immediately (testing). 3 = production. Reinstalling resets the user's clock.

OPTIONAL_FIELDS.title: Overrides the modal title. Plain string for all users, or per-language: {"en": "...", "es": "...", "fr": "...", "ja": "...", "pt": "..."}. Missing languages fall back to en. Omit the field entirely = built-in translated default 'A Gift for You'.
OPTIONAL_FIELDS.subtitle: Overrides the modal subtitle. Same string-or-per-language format as title.
OPTIONAL_FIELDS.urgency: Extra amber highlight line in the modal, next to the countdown timer. Only claim scarcity if a real redemption cap is set in LS.
OPTIONAL_FIELDS.expiresAt: ISO date like 2026-07-18T23:59:59Z. Shows a live ticking timer in the modal (2d 05:12:33) AND auto-hides the whole offer the moment it passes. Match the real LS discount expiry.

CHARACTER_LIMITS.why: The modal is ~320px wide. Longer text wraps gracefully but looks best on one line. ES/PT/FR run 20-30% longer than EN — write the EN line short and the translations usually fit.
CHARACTER_LIMITS.title: Max ~30 chars (one line in the modal header). Example: 'Black Friday Sale' = 17.
CHARACTER_LIMITS.subtitle: Max ~80 chars (wraps to 2 lines fine, avoid 3). Example: 'Our biggest discount of the year.' = 33.
CHARACTER_LIMITS.urgency_without_expiresAt: Max ~45 chars (has the full line to itself).
CHARACTER_LIMITS.urgency_with_expiresAt: Max ~22 chars EN / ~28 chars ES-PT-FR — it shares one line with the timer (~11 chars wide). Longer = timer drops to a 2nd line (clean, but less tidy). Example: '🔥 Limited-time offer' = 21. Emoji counts as ~2.
CHARACTER_LIMITS.code: Max ~20 chars — keeps the code box and Copy button on one line.

HOW_TO.disable: Set enabled to false (or replace the whole file content with {}).
HOW_TO.new_campaign: Change id + code + percent + copy. New id = shows to everyone again, including past dismissers.
HOW_TO.edit_running_campaign: Keep the same id — users who dismissed it will NOT see your edits. If the change must reach everyone, use a new id.
HOW_TO.propagation: GitHub caches ~5 min, users' extensions check hourly. Total: fix visible to all users within ~65 min.
HOW_TO.launch_checklist: 1) LS discount active with duration=once + expiry (+ optional max redemptions). 2) code below matches LS exactly. 3) percent matches LS. 4) expiresAt matches LS expiry. 5) minDaysInstalled set to 3.
